text.title: Nginx Configuration Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the backend an HTTP service that needs reverse-proxy + TLS termination at nginx?

branch.question: Does the backend serve WebSocket / SSE long-lived connections?

conclusion.verdict: HTTPS server block with http2 + proxy_http_version 1.1 + Upgrade headers; rate-limit on auth path
HTTPS server block with http2 + standard proxy_pass; rate-limit on auth path

branch.question: Pure static asset serving (SPA, marketing site)?

conclusion.verdict: HTTPS server block with root + try_files; expires 1y for assets; gzip on text/* only
Hybrid: try_files for static, proxy_pass for /api

text.example: reverse_proxy_required=true → websocket=true → HTTPS http2 server block with proxy_http_version 1.1 + Upgrade headers + rate-limit zone on /api/auth/. References rule http-2-or-3.
